sourcePrompt: A C-130 Hercules tactical transport, about thirty meters long, squatting low on stubby gear housed in fuselage sponsons. A fat round-nosed fuselage rides under a high straight wing carrying four turboprops with broad propellers; the rear fuselage sweeps up over a full-width cargo ramp, and a tall slab tail fin rises above it.. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
